subject: docs(claude): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props (missing rules + cleanup patterns)
body:
Fleet-alignment pass via `align` trigger. Backfills six items that
drifted from glow-props CLAUDE.md:

Communication
- "Work, not process" — don't opine on branching/PR/git process

Code Standards
- New "Timer and Subscription Cleanup" subsection covering paired
  cleanup for setTimeout/setInterval/addEventListener/subscribe, Vue 3
  Composition API pairing (onMounted/onBeforeUnmount, onScopeDispose),
  plain-module AbortController/dispose(), and HMR-safe guards with
  import.meta.hot.dispose(). References glow-props TIMER_LEAKS.md.

AI Notes
- "All code is yours" — all repo work is prior assistant work; don't
  hedge authorship or investigate as third-party.

Prohibitions (three new entries)
- No mention of branches/PRs/squash/rebase/merge/force-push unless
  user raises it first
- No "out of scope" framing — work is doable or blocked on input
- No opinions on git history editing, branch strategy, PR size,
  review flow, or commit structure

Local strengthenings (ABSOLUTE RULE on AskUserQuestion, Z-Index Scale,
DaisyUI sync points, Project Status, EVENT_BUS not-applicable note)
kept as intentional divergences per align comparison.

Tags: docs, claude-md, fleet-alignment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
